comment: Splynek Trust catalog. Every concern MUST cite a primary source: Apple App Store privacy label, EU DPA / FTC / SEC ruling, NVD CVE, HIBP breach, or vendor security advisory. NEVER editorial. NEVER tech press. NEVER community ratings. Run 'swift Scripts/regenerate-trust-catalog.swift' to refresh the generated Swift. See TRUST-CONTRIBUTING.md for the source allowlist.

concerns.summary: Adobe issued multiple Acrobat security bulletins in 2024 patching critical RCE CVEs (e.g. APSB24-29, APSB24-86).
App Store privacy label declares Linked Data across 8 categories including Contacts, Sensitive Info, User Content.
App Store privacy label declares Linked Data across 7 categories including User Content, Identifiers, and Usage Data.
Confirmed 2013 breach affecting 153M user records: usernames, encrypted passwords, hint plaintexts. Indexed by HIBP.
App Store privacy label discloses linked data: identifiers, usage data, contact info, purchases, diagnostics.
App Store privacy label discloses tracking data: identifiers, advertising data, usage data, location, contact info.
App Store privacy label discloses linked data: identifiers, usage data, contact info, contacts, user content, diagnostics.

App Store privacy label discloses extensive tracking, mirroring Instagram's profile across identifiers, browsing history, location, and purchase history.

App Store privacy label discloses extensive tracking: identifiers, location, contacts, browsing history, advertising data, search history, purchase history. Linked Data across 19 categories — Health & Fitness, Sensitive Info, Financial Info included.

Confirmed 2013 breach: usernames, hashed passwords, email addresses for 50M users exposed. Indexed by HIBP.

App Store privacy label discloses tracking across other companies' apps and websites: identifiers, usage, location, contact info, purchases.
Ireland's DPC fined Meta €1.2B in 2023 for unlawful EU-to-US data transfers — largest GDPR fine to date.
FTC imposed a $5B fine on Facebook (now Meta) in 2019 over privacy violations including Cambridge Analytica.

Confirmed breach in 2012 affecting 68M users; credentials including hashed passwords exposed. Indexed by HIBP.

Google paid $391.5M to 40 US state attorneys general in 2022 over location-tracking practices in Chrome and other products.
CNIL fined Google €150M in 2022 for cookie-consent UX in Chrome that made refusing cookies harder than accepting.

Federal Register Final Determination 2024-13869 (BIS): prohibits Kaspersky software sales in the US effective September 29, 2024.
Confirmed breach in 2022: encrypted password vaults exfiltrated. Vendor confirmed in formal disclosure.
HIBP indexed multiple LastPass-related breaches involving customer-vault metadata and source-code access.

Confirmed breach in 2022: source-code repository access via stolen employee tokens. No customer data accessed per Slack's disclosure.
Cursor's privacy policy discloses default-on telemetry; Privacy Mode toggle exists but is opt-in.

Ireland's DPC fined WhatsApp €225M in 2021 for transparency failures under GDPR Article 13 and 14.
Irish DPC fined TikTok €345M in 2023 over child-data processing — public-by-default settings and improper handling of child data.
Irish DPC fined TikTok €530M in 2025 for unlawful EEA-to-China data transfers and transparency failures.
App Store privacy label discloses tracking data: identifiers, location, browsing history, purchases used to track across apps and websites.
App Store privacy label declares Linked Data: Identifiers, Usage Data, Diagnostics — moderate collection for a browser.

App Store privacy label declares ONLY Unlinked Data: Contact Info — Signal's privacy posture is famously minimal; the only data collected is the phone number used to register, not linked to user identity.

US OFAC has sanctioned multiple Russian-affiliated entities since 2022; Yandex was split in 2024 with Russian operations under sanctions risk.

FTC settlement in 2020: Zoom misled users about end-to-end encryption and installed software circumventing browser security.
